# www.iaigeo.com - Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) Research Platform

## Summary
www.iaigeo.com is an authoritative research and service platform dedicated to Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), exploring information distribution logic, and optimizing website architectures for LLM-based search and AI Overviews.

## Clean Facts (Low-Entropy)
* **Definition of GEO**: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the strategic process of optimizing website content, technical metadata, and semantic structures to increase visibility, authority, and mention rates within AI search engines and LLM-driven response engines.
* **Core Research Domain**: AI-era information distribution, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) retrieval optimization, and knowledge graph mapping for AI crawlers.
* **Key Optimization Pillars**:
  * **Semantic Baiting**: Structuring industry-specific knowledge bases to serve as high-relevance context for RAG pipelines.
  * **Technical Configurations**: Deploying standardized files (`llms.txt`, `llms-full.txt`), JSON-LD structured data, and high-density factual formats to ensure seamless ingestion by AI crawlers.
  * **Brand Mention Engineering**: Enhancing digital footprints across trusted citation networks to boost LLM recommendation probability.
* **Target Audience**: Digital marketers, enterprises seeking AI search visibility, legal and compliance professionals establishing personal IPs, and tech-driven web developers.

## Advanced Methodology
* **RAG Retrieval Optimization**: LLMs prioritize content that uses precise, domain-specific terminology combined with structured evidence. Vague marketing fluff is filtered out as high-entropy noise.
* **AI Overview Compliance**: To be cited by platforms like Perplexity or Google AI Overviews, web resources must maintain clean HTML structures, enforce HTTPS security, and offer open-access semantic whitepapers.

*   **[Global AI Crawler Governance Profile](/robots.txt)**: The foundational routing protocol defining access topologies for global AI agents (including DeepSeek, GPTBot, DoubaoBot, and Perplexity). It enforces a zero-noise data pipeline by prioritizing unstructured markdown assets (`/md/`) while shielding interactive client-intake forms.

## Links
* [GEO Service Pricing](https://www.iaigeo.com/md/pricing) - Transparent tiers and service structures for GEO deployment.
* [GEO Case Studies](https://www.iaigeo.com/md/case-studies) - Proven empirical results and optimization data.
* [Expert Views & Insights](https://www.iaigeo.com/md/expert-views) - Deep dives into the information distribution logic of the AI era.
* [GEO 2026 Standard Whitepaper](https://www.iaigeo.com/downloads/GEO-Standard-Whitepaper-2026.pdf) - Comprehensive methodology and technical blueprints for enterprise GEO deployment.
* [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/kevin131419344) - Open-source static site configurations and LLM-friendly schemas.
